title: Campaigns | Kevin Bonavia MP
text_excerpt: --> Campaigns | Kevin Bonavia MP top of page Introduction Personal Promises Online Newsletter Stay in touch Upcoming Events Campaigns Latest News Parliament Access help all year round More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Campaigns This page is to share news and information on the campaigns and initiatives I am involved with. As our MP, I work with lots of local groups to deliver for Stevenage and our villages. Check here for updates and details on ways to get involved. Pride in Place​ The St Nicholas neighbourhood has been selected to receive £20 million of Government investment over the next ten years through the Pride in Place programme. This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to restore pride in our area, improve local services and create new opportunities for residents, especially our young people. ​ What makes this programme truly special is that it will be community-led. This is not a scheme imposed from the Council or the Government. Instead, local residents like you will have real power to decide how this funding is spent and what priorities we focus on as a neighbourhood. ​ Over the coming months and beyond, I’ll be working closely with residents, businesses, Stevenage Borough Council and community groups to get things moving. What makes this special is that local people decide exactly what to focus on, and how the funds are spent. Your voice will be heard. ​ I’ll be sharing updates along the way, and by completing the survey you can stay in touch throughout to hear the exciting progress we’re making, together. This is your opportunity to help shape the future of the St Nicholas neighbourhood, now and for the next generation. I hope you’ll join me on this incredible project. ​ I am encouraging every household in St Nick’s to take a few minutes to complete our online survey and share your views on what matters most to you and your family. Have your say and stay in touch by taking the quick survey: Pride in Place survey © 2024 Promoted By Tom Plater on behalf of Kevin Bonavia MP both at Ground floor right Osprey house, Primett Road, Stevenage, SG1 3EE My Privacy Policy My Acceptable Behaviour Policy bottom of page
